message:
test: comprehensive E2E tests for noise control, notifications, and secret scanning

Add extensive test coverage for three interconnected subsystems:

Events — noise control pipeline (wa-upg.8.6):
- E2E tests for dedup-then-cooldown interaction lifecycle
- Suppressed count escalation tracking
- Cooldown suppressed-count reported on next send
- Filter short-circuiting before dedup/cooldown layers
- Multi-pane independence (per-pane dedup state isolation)
- Mute lifecycle with storage (add/check/list/remove)
- Mute expiry with TTL
- Full pipeline integration: dedup → cooldown → mute → send
- JSON stability test for noise control state serialization

Notifications — secret redaction in payloads:
- Verify OpenAI keys, GitHub tokens, database URL passwords,
  Stripe keys, and quick-fix commands are redacted in notification
  summaries and descriptions
- Confirm clean text passes through without modification
- JSON serialization does not leak secrets
- Metadata fields preserved after redaction
- Rate-limited sender allows first send within window

Secrets — comprehensive scan and hash tests:
- hash_secret determinism and uniqueness for different inputs
- hex_encode correctness for empty and known values
- Default ScanOptions validation
- Scope construction from options (filters, hash determinism)
- Secret pattern detection: OpenAI, Anthropic, GitHub, AWS, Slack,
  Stripe, generic high-entropy, database URLs, private keys, JWTs
- False positive resistance for safe strings
- Full scan integration with multi-segment, multi-pane scenarios
- Resume scan with checkpoint preservation
- Storage round-trip for scan reports and finding persistence
- Concurrent scan isolation
- Report merge semantics
- ~84 new test functions total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
